title: event.find request

clock.description: Action-specific clock input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

edge.description: Clock sampling edge. The schema default is authoritative; negedge often matches monitor semantics.

expr.description: Action-specific expr input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

line_limit.description: Limits returned evidence rows only, not scanning, aggregation, or the verdict; read completeness fields as well.

max_samples.description: Maximum number of clock samples to inspect. Exhaustion makes analysis incomplete; it is not a response-row limit.

mode.description: first and last return the chronologically first or last match; all returns multiple matches. line_limit is valid only with all.

name.description: Saved-object name in this action namespace; do not assume names are shared by cursors, lists, and protocol configs.

rst_n.description: Active-low reset signal path or alias. Samples while reset is asserted do not participate in event matching.

sample_point.description: Before/after observation point for posedge or dual sampling; it does not change the raw waveform range.

items.description: Signal-path list or alias-to-path/expression map. Expressions must reference aliases rather than nested paths.

oneOf.description: Signal-path list or alias-to-path/expression map. Expressions must reference aliases rather than nested paths.

additionalProperties.description: Value for a caller-defined signal alias key. Supply the real signal path or the action-supported expression for that alias.
additionalProperties.x-dynamic-contract: Each property key is an alias referenced by this action; each value resolves that alias to a signal path or supported expression.

oneOf.description: Signal-path list or alias-to-path/expression map. Expressions must reference aliases rather than nested paths.

signals.description: Signal-path list or alias-to-path/expression map. Expressions must reference aliases rather than nested paths.

begin.description: Action-specific begin input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

end.description: Action-specific end input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

time_range.description: Closed analysis interval. begin and end may be omitted independently to use the available waveform bounds.

time_unit.description: Interprets only unitless time numbers; it never overrides a time string that already has a unit.

description: Find sampled events that match an expression.
x-purpose: 查找满足表达式的事件样例。
x-how_it_works: 用 name 配置或 inline clock/signals 构建 EventQuery，按 clock sampling 模式扫描表达式命中；表达式支持布尔组合、相等比较和大小比较。
x-when_to_use: 快速找到协议条件发生的时间。
x-arg_contract_notes: required: expr; also one of: name / clock + signals
x-description-zh: 查找满足表达式的事件样例。

use_when: 需要按 clock edge 查找满足表达式的采样事件。
do_not_use_when: 需要原始 value-change timeline 或标准 AXI/APB transaction。
constraints: required: expr; also one of: name / clock + signals
